_comment: Per-1M-token rates in USD used by generate_gpt5_agent_residual_table.py. gpt-5.4 is a project-internal model alias; rates below are placeholders modeled on OpenAI's published gpt-5 family pricing (late 2025). Verify against your billing dashboard before publishing the cost column.

notes.input: Charged on the non-cached portion of agentRun.llm.inputTokens (= inputTokens - cacheReadInputTokens).
notes.cached_input: Charged on agentRun.llm.cacheReadInputTokens. Non-zero in these runs because the agent uses split-static-prefix prompt caching.
notes.reasoning: Charged on agentRun.llm.reasoningTokens. Currently 0 for OpenAI in this run set; included for forward compatibility with reasoning models.
